item.title: SpiderCapo - Spider Capo - Capodastres pour guitares Spider Capo - capodastre
item.description: Vous avez SpiderCapo - Spider Capo - Capodastres pour guitares Spider Capo - capodastre ici: ℹ️: Play in hundreds of tunings without detuning the guitar Capo each string individually Capo all 6 strings like a regular capo Weighs less than 1 oz Fits all guitar fingerboards 🛒 Achetez-le maintenant!! Check the price of this item in other countries: 🇬🇧 United Kingdom | 🇺🇸 USA | 🇩🇪 Germany | 🇪🇸 Spain | 🇫🇷 France | 🇮🇹 Italia | 🇦🇪 Arab Emirates | 🇨🇦 Canada | 🇧🇪 Belgium | 🇳🇱 Neederlands | 🇵🇱 Poland | 🇸🇪 Sweden |
